forbidden_paths: production live execution outside bounded packet
next_lawful_action: After required_read_order, run: python3 -m kernel implementation "Mechanical carrier: kernel packet then assigned role passes only; no chat route"; require required_surfaces_ok: True in the printed trace. Then execute the first role pass (steward) using only required_reads for that pass.
objective: Mechanical carrier: kernel packet then assigned role passes only; no chat route
return_contract: Carrier returns a proposal: findings, touched paths, diffs or patch intent, risks, and receipt fields per ION_WORK_PACKET_TEMPLATE until Steward integrates.

role_phase_sequence.purpose: classify the task and prepare the scoped implementation route
define scope, dependencies, and required review posture
apply risk pressure if the slice affects continuity or governance
audit or verify when the slice becomes release-sensitive

workstream: implementation
objective: Mechanical carrier: kernel packet then assigned role passes only; no chat route
required_surfaces_ok: True

   - steward.projection.STATUS.md: ION/STATUS.md [optional]

4. vice — apply risk pressure if the slice affects continuity or governance
